title: Product, Market & User Research Manager
required_skills: Degree in Marketing, Market Research, Product Management or related
Research report writing and strategic recommendations
bonus_skills: Proficiency in Chinese (strong advantage given AVATR is Chinese EV brand)
matched_skills: Competitor intelligence and market analysis (GRG Banking, IPC)
Chinese language C2 (strong advantage for Chinese company)
missing_skills: Team management / people leadership experience (no direct reports in CV)
core_responsibilities: Formulate and implement overall European research strategy
Oversee market and product research on European EV market
Output product configuration lists and research reports
recommended_emphasis: Highlight Chinese language (C2) — very strong signal for Chinese EV brand
Frame GRG Banking market analysis as structured market/product research
Frame ECE Group competitive analysis as European market intelligence
Do NOT fabricate team management experience

company_info.size_raw: not found in JD, estimated small design center
